case_title: LEM/RAY PROPERTIES, LLC VS. GLENDA MARCELINO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEM/RAY PROPERTIES, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEM/RAY PROPERTIES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARCELINO, GLENDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 935 GEARY ST. #401, S.F. CA. 94109, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEM/RAY PROPERTIES, LLC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MARCELINO, GLENDA

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEM/RAY PROPERTIES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MARCELINO, GLENDA DOES 1-X, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $25.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEM/RAY PROPERTIES, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEM/RAY PROPERTIES, LLC SERVED AUG-30-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARCELINO, GLENDA
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT MARCELINO, GLENDA
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MARCELINO, GLENDA
